summary: E2E testing complete for CalmSphere AI Google OAuth migration. All features working correctly - landing page with Get Started/Sign In buttons, Login page with Continue with Google button, backend API operational status, auth protection for protected routes.
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session in MongoDB for backend API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google OAuth migration complete. Test session created in calmsphere_db. Backend uses auth_middleware.get_current_user_id for protected routes. Frontend Login.js redirects to accounts.emergent.dev/oauth/google. Session exchange via /api/auth/session endpoint.
tested_features: Landing page loads with Get Started and Sign In buttons - PASSED
Login page shows Continue with Google button - PASSED
Google OAuth button redirects to accounts.emergent.dev - PASSED
Backend /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token - PASSED
Protected endpoints (profile, dashboard, modules) require auth - PASSED
Back to Home button on login page works - PASSED
